## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (added/updated tests for the change)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under an `## [Unreleased]` or next-version heading
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or personal paths committed
